decisions.question: What fields to add to the niwa_await_task timeout response to let a coordinator assess task health without a follow-up query
decisions.chosen: last_progress (TaskProgress struct with summary + at) when non-nil

decisions.question: What restart context to include in terminal results when restart_count > 0
decisions.chosen: max_restarts when restart_count > 0; last_progress when non-nil (both for all terminal states)
